name: Altadena Blocc Crips (ABC)
description: Altadena Blocc Crip are a predominately African-American street gang located in the city of Altadena, just north of Pasadena. They have been active since about 1979/1980. ABCs Resting in Peace Tiny Ace Roc Baldie C-Neil Daniel “C-Roc” Fuller, 30 (March 6, 1969 – October 31, 2009) Lil C-Roc Casper Loc Criptonite Lil Cuz Flem Flam Goddy Guydie Ice Man L-Bone Lil Joker Baby Killa Rob Lil Loco Monk Ne.
